name: FIREZ 1500 Slimline
shortDescription: The FIREZ 1500 Slimline combines stunning panoramic flame visuals with an ultra-slim 190mm installation depth, perfect for modern media walls where space is at a premium.
description:
The FIREZ 1500 Slimline combines stunning panoramic flame visuals with an ultra-slim installation depth, making it the perfect choice for modern homes where space is at a premium. With a built-in depth of just 190mm, it creates a sleek, contemporary media wall with significantly less projection than a traditional fireplace, while still delivering the impressive flame display that has made the 1500 one of our best-selling models.

Featuring the same advanced technology found throughout the FIREZ range, the 1500 Slimline offers one of the most realistic and visually striking 3D Reflectory Flame effects available. Control every feature effortlessly using the supplied remote control, smartphone app, Alexa voice control, or the convenient manual push-button controls. The integrated 1.6kW heater provides additional warmth whenever you need it, making this fireplace as practical as it is beautiful.

Supplied as standard with a premium high-definition mixed log fuel bed, the FIREZ 1500 Slimline can also be upgraded to our deluxe real log fuel bed for an even more authentic appearance. Choose from one-sided, two-sided or three-sided panoramic glass configurations, allowing you to create the perfect bespoke media wall design to suit your home.
features: High-definition mixed log fuel bed included
Optional upgrade to a deluxe real log fuel bed
Choice of 1, 2 or 3-sided panoramic glass installation
closingText: Customise the ambience with multiple flame colours, adjustable flame speeds, realistic glowing ember effects, and independently controlled over-bed and under-bed lighting. Whether you're relaxing in the evening or entertaining guests, the FIREZ 1500 Slimline creates a spectacular focal point that captures the charm of a real wood-burning fire—without the mess, maintenance or inconvenience.
callToAction: Available from Zebra Trades with supply only or professional installation.

seo.title: FIREZ 1500 Slimline Electric Fire & Media Wall | Zebra Trades
seo.description: Discover the FIREZ 1500 Slimline electric fireplace with realistic 3D flames, Alexa and app control, panoramic glass options and a space-saving 190mm installation depth. Supply only or fully installed by Zebra Trades.
seo.altText: FIREZ 1500 Slimline electric fireplace installed in a contemporary bespoke media wall with television above.
